main.description: Reverse pointer from a bidder's repo to the operator's badgeBlueKeys record. Bridges the did:key to operator DID gap for vouch graph traversal. The associationProof strongRef MUST point to a valid badgeBlueKeys record where keyId matches this bidder's market did:key.

operatorDid.description: ATProto DID of the operator who created the badgeBlueKeys record associating this bidder's did:key with their account.

associationProof.description: Strong reference to the operator's badgeBlueKeys record that associates this bidder's did:key with the operator's DID. The pointed-to record's keyId must match this bidder's market did:key.

signatures.description: badge.blue attestations over this association. Must include the bidder's inline signature, attached at creation.
